description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a bullpup configuration, placing the magazine and action behind the trigger for a compact profile. The body is predominantly dark, with a sleek, matte finish and subtle purple highlights, giving it a futuristic appearance. It is equipped with a scope mounted on the top rail, enhancing its precision for long-range targeting. The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the main body, and the stock is integrated into the rear section, contributing to the compactness. The magazine is box-shaped and detachable, positioned behind the pistol grip. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical for advanced urban combat rifles.
description: A sleek, dark bullpup rifle with a long barrel, integrated scope, and detachable box magazine, featuring a modern tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, scope, bullpup stock, and magazine placement.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the scope.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and overall compact bullpup layout.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the scope, with the barrel receding into the distance.
